titleStmt.title: SII 38.440: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 440. (A.R. No. 440 of 1912.) TIRUPPĀLATTUṞAI, MANNARGUDI TALUK, TANJAVUR DISTRICT. On the east wall, first prākāra, Kshīravanēśvara temple.

summary.p: Damaged and unfinished. Begins with a portion of the meykīrtti, Jayamādum. It seems to record a royal order issued to the temple officials i.e., dēvakaṉmi, śrīmāhēśvarakkaṇkāṇi, śrīkāriyam-śeyvār of the Tiruppālattuṟai-uḍaiyār temple in Nallūr-nāḍu in Nittavinōda-vaḷanāḍu. It seems to convey the grant of land, called kāval-kāḍu, free from taxes, as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili, naming it Rājagembīranallūr, apparently for conducting offerings and worship. The lands already earmarked for garden and tirumaḍaiviḷāgam were excluded from the present grant. Further it is also mentioned that taxes like antarāyan were waived from the 13th regnal year to the 17th regnal year. Reference is also made to the revenue survey (aḷavu) of the sixteen and fortieth regnal years (1087 and 1110 A.D.) of suṅgantavirttadēva i.e., Kulōttuṅga I, though its purport cannot be ascertained.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
jayamātum nāmaruviya kalaimātum pukaḻmātum nayaṉtu pulka Arumaṟai vitiyaṉaittun taḻaippa varumuṟai Urimaiyil maṇimuṭicūṭi tiṅkaḷ veṇkuṭai ticaikkaḷu ṅku taṉi kūṭantāneṉ viḷaṅka karuṅkalippaṭṭi mikaic ceṅkol turappa pa
ṉavar ciṅkaḷar pallavar nutaliyar pāttivar paṇiya Eṇṇaruṅ kaṟpi maṇṇakam puṇarntu cempoṉvirasimm(mma)āsaṉattu puvaṉa muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟ pparakecaripaṟmarā cakkaravartikaḷ śrī Irājarājatevaṟku yāṇṭu 10 2 panniraṇṭāvatu
nittaviṉota vaḷanāṭṭu nallūrnāṭṭu tirup lattuṟai Uṭaiyār koyil tevarkaṉmikkum śrī māheśvarak kaṇkāṇi ceyvāṉukkum śrī kāriyañceyvāṉukkum tevarkku veṇṭum k kiṟuppatāka Innāṭṭuk muḻutuṭaiyāḷ toppil kāvaṟ kāṭāyk kātta ciyarkku patiṉāṟāvatu Aḷavil niṅkal
l nilam paḻamperum kāvaṟkāṭāy niṅkalāy vacakaṟpāṭiyum tavirntu paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu pacāṉa mutal tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu Irājakempiranallūreṉṉum perāl veṟu piṟittu Innilattukku veli Oṉṟukku ne �ka Iṟai kaṭṭiyum Innilattukkup paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu pacānamum Itaṉetirāmāṇṭu mutal nā
Itil tevatāṉam Uḷḷurka(ḷ)ḷāṉa tirucciṟṟampalanallūr nilam Aiveliyum patiṉāṟāvataḷavil Ittevar tirunāmattu niṅkalāka nikkiṉa nilattukku meleṟṟamāka Ittevarkku śrī koyilum tirumuṟṟamun tirumaṭaiviḷākamun tirunantavaṉamu nilattukku tāṅkaḷum koyiṟkaṇakkanum Irājarājamaṅkalatara(ā)yanum Uḷḷiṭṭār Eḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi
vil kāvaṟkāṭum kāverikulaikku maṇ ke Oṭaiyumāy niṅkal varukiṟa nilattu Oṉṟaraiye Irumā Araikkāṇikku mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻ
kuṭalā vattu nilamum kiḻ Oṉpatu mā nālumā Araikkāṇi mun=tarikai tavintu �ṉamutal
nilattu tevatāṉa Iṭṭu lūr nilam Aiveliyum paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu picāṉa mutal tevatāṉaiṟaiyiliyāka kaikkoṇṭu Ittevarku veṇṭum nimantañ celuttavum Innilattukkup paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu pacāṉamum Itan Etirāmāṇṭu mutal nālāmāṇṭum Antarāyam kuṭukkātoḻiyavum Ittirucciṟṟampala nallū
muḻutuṭaiyā ṉāṟāvatu Aḷavil kāva laiku maṇkoṇṭa Oṭaiyumāy niṅkalāy varukiṟa nilattu tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭu Ivvūre kūṭṭi niṅkalāka nikkiṉa nilamum paṉṉiraṇṭāvatu pacāṉa mutal Ittevaṟku tirunantavaṉamum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum Uḷḷiṭṭa niṅkalāynikkavum paṇṇuka Eḻuti nāṉ mantiraōlai
ḷum vātarāyaṉ mu toṇṭaimāṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu 1000 2 100 .§ yāṇṭu 1000 2 100 varā 6 10 4 tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭukkaṭṭiṉa paṭikkum niṅkalāka nikkiṉapaṭikkum Uḷvari nittaviṉotavaḷanāṭṭu nallūrnāṭṭut tirupālaittuṟai Uṭaiyār tevatāṉam Uḷḷurkaḷāka tirucciṟṟampalanallūr nilam Ai velikkum cu
mum tirumaṭaiviḷākamum tirunantavaṉamumāy varukiṉṟa nilattil cuṅkaṉ taviranta tevaṟkup patiṉāṟāvatu Aḷavil niṅkalāka nikkiṉa nilam nikki Eṟṟamāṉa nilamāy niṅkalāka nikkukiṟa nilattukku rājarājamaṅkala ta(ā)rāyarum Ivaṟkāka Ikkoyilukku cikāriya maṇappākkiḻāṉum nila Aḷavu paṭṭaṉ vatsakottirattuk kulakutti Āṭkoṇṭanāyakapaṭṭanum
pāruvuṉūruṭaiyānum Eḻuttu kaṇakkuppaṭi nilattu Innāṭṭukkuñ ciraṉāṉa puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷtoppil cuṅkan tavittaruḷiṉa tevaṟku 6vatu Aḷavil kāvaṟkāṭum kāverikkulaikku maṇkoṇṭa O(ō)ṭaiyumaṭaiya niṅkalāy varukiṟa nilattu Akappaṭṭa nilattu nilamāy paḻamperum kāvaṟkāṭāy varukiṟapaṭiyun tavintu
2 1000 » Āka » 6(1/2) va nna ku � tma ca 2 1000 » 10 nma 2 1000muntirikku Iṟai kaṭṭiṉa nilattāl 4 10vatu Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa ṅaḷḷa Itu 100 Ivvūr Iṟaikaṭṭukkuṭalāṉa nilattum kuñciranāṉa puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷāṉatoppil 10 1 vatu Aḷavil kāvaṟkāṭum Oṭaiyum napu » mūṉṟumā kalāy varukiṟa nilattum tevarkku tirumaṭaiviḷākamum tirunantavaṉamumāka ceyta nilattu
ya varukiṟapaṭi tavira rumkkiṟa nilamum kuñciranāṉa maṭaiya toppil niṅkal nilattu Akappaṭṭu tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyiṭṭu kūṭiṉa nilamumāy yāṇṭu [10 8] rāṉa mutal niṅkalāka ka ṉa Ittevar śrīkoyilum mum » (1/4) � » casyakin maṭaiviḷākam » 100 ku sa ken
rusa 4 tevar m puḷiyum ṟeṇ na kulottuṅka coḻa Ittirunantavaṉattukku tāṭu ttu caga ṅ kaḻan Āka cca vūr cuṅkattavirtta
yilun tirumuṟ � tirumaṭaiviḷākam » � mukkāṇi teṅkum māvum niṉṟa tirunantavaṉam » tma4 mūn_ṛumā � Alari niṉṟa tirunantavaṉa kura� kum pokaviṭṭa peru ṭai » � 1muntiri » � ku � nikki Ivvūr Iṟaikaṭṭukku Uṭalāṉa nilattu
tukku 4 10vatu Iṟai kaṭṭiṉa Opāti ḷā00cu 0 2§ nna kuñciranāṉapuvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷ toppil pa vatu Aḷavil niṅkal nilattum pokaviṭṭa peru ṭai » (1/4) 8 sta » � ma » � ç sta » � sa nikki Ivvūr Iṟaikaṭṭukku Uṭalāṉa nilattu
kkiṉa » � ru ru � sa Āka niṅkal nikki nca dva » (1/4) Iṟaikaṭṭiṉa ru taDamaged and incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 38.440 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
